title: The Train Ride Book

sections.heading: WHAT YOU'LL NEED TO PLAY
sections.middleText1:
two single or multi-message switches
record:
"what" on one switch 
"see" on the other
sections.middleText2: the book The Train Ride by June Crebbin

sections.heading: HOW TO PLAY
sections.body:
1. Use switches to complete repeated lines of The Train Ride. 
2. Begin reading the book. 
3. Model switch use on the first repeated line "We're off on a journey out of the town (what) shall I (see)."
4. Continue reading and pause so the switch user can fill in the gap.

tooltipText: Use 2 switches to say the repeated line in the book
